name: Follow My Sunshine
overview: This is the story of two childhood friends Minh Nhat and Thanh Van, who are as close as brothers, but when they arrive at college and Minh Nhat finds himself a girlfriend Thanh Van lives his darkest moment, Minh Nhat is not only his best friend, he is also his first love.

trailers.title: 🏳️‍🌈SAU VẠT NẮNG - Official Trailer | WEB DRAMA | Phim Đam Mỹ Tâm Lý Tình Cảm |20:00 Ngày 23/12/2020
